title: Pokereth #6380
definition:
Pochereth of Zebaim = "here the cutting off"

 1) a servant of Solomon whose descendants returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Pochereth of Zebaim = "here the cutting off"

 1) a servant of Solomon whose descendants returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel

    NASB:  bindress of the gazelles, head of a postexilic family
